commands.review_summary:
The PR makes local-model lean embedded runs derive structured Tool Search defaults when `tools.toolSearch` is unset, preserves explicit Tool Search config, adds focused tests, and updates local-model documentation.

PR surface: Source +32, Tests +82, Docs +2. Total +116 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source: on the PR head, `applyLocalModelLeanToolSearchDefaults` creates a derived `tools.toolSearch` object for lean runs without explicit Tool Search config, and `runEmbeddedAttempt` uses that derived config for control exposure and cataloging. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] This protected maintainer PR needs a maintainer decision on an upgrade-visible default plus a small config-help alignment, not an autonomous cleanup close.
